title: paeonia anomala subsp. hybrida
intro: Paeonia anomala subsp. hybrida, also known as the Chinese peony or white peony, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Paeonia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative effects, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Paeonia anomala subsp. hybrida include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Herbal preparations of Paeonia anomala subsp. hybrida include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
